message:
Fix manifest parsing to read chunk 2 (full manifest data)

Lance manifests have two chunks:
- Chunk 1: Transaction metadata (may be small/incremental)
- Chunk 2: Full manifest with schema + fragments

The parser was only reading chunk 1, causing 0 fragments to load
when the dataset had IVF index updates. Now correctly reads chunk 2
which contains all 20 fragments and schema fields.
